label: Ontario employment relative to working-age population growth
description: Growth in employment relative to the working-age population accounts for rapid population change.
comparisonLimitations: Definitions, currencies, industrial structure and release timing differ across countries.
interpretation: Growth in employment relative to the working-age population accounts for rapid population change.
confirmingIndicators: Employment rate, participation and job composition

calculation.formula: YoY percent change in (employment / working-age population)
calculation.explanation: YoY percent change in (employment / working-age population)

limitations: Statistics Canada may revise recent and historical observations.
